messages.content:
customer wanted status for her pick up order

our macro:"It appears the store team is still working on your order. However, as soon as it is ready, you will receive an email notification with the confirmation that your order is Ready for Pick Up.

Pick Up orders are normally ready within 6 hours of being placed!  If it passes that timeframe, please feel free to call the store directly, or reply here.

If you have any questions, please let me know. "

please also add that since her order is massive or she has lots of items on her order it may take more time to process the order please be patient (or something like that)

Certainly! Here is the revised message including the additional information:

"Thank you for reaching out to us regarding your pick-up order status. It appears the store team is still diligently working on your order. Due to the considerable size and many items in your order, it may take a bit more time for us to prepare and ensure that everything is correct. Please rest assured that as soon as it is ready, you will receive an email notification with the confirmation that your order is Ready for Pick Up.

While pick-up orders are normally ready within 6 hours of being placed, please understand that larger orders such as yours can take longer to process. Your patience is greatly appreciated. If the timeframe extends significantly, or if you have any concerns, feel free to call the store directly or reply to this message for further assistance.

We thank you for your understanding and are doing our best to have your order ready as soon as possible. If you have any further questions or need additional support, please let me know and I'll be glad to assist."

<new context>

"I checked our system and can absolutely confirm that you were only charged for the items you picked up: 

[[IMAGE OF ITEMS PICKED UP/CHARGED FOR HERE]]


The other items that they did not have in stock were removed from your order and you were not charged for them:

[[IMAGE OF SHORTED ITEMS HERE]]"

please change them to items that are available for pick up not picked up since customer has not picked up the order yet

Certainly! Here is your revised message reflecting that the customer has not yet picked up the order:

"I checked our system and can confirm that you have only been charged for the items that are available for pick up:

[[IMAGE OF ITEMS AVAILABLE FOR PICK UP/CHARGED FOR HERE]]

Any items that were not in stock at the time of processing have been removed from your order, and you have not been charged for them:

[[IMAGE OF SHORTED ITEMS HERE]]

Please review the images above to ensure everything is in order. We will hold the available items for you and await your pickup at the designated time. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out."

csr:"
I am so sorry that your most recent pick-up order R309221021 was short items!   It looks like this was due to an inventory error that we were not aware of until the store attempted to fulfill your order.    

I checked our system and can confirm that you have only been charged for the items that are available for pick up.
 
Any items that were not in stock at the time of processing have been removed from your order, and you have not been charged for it:
 




If you are seeing a pending charge for the original amount, it will fall off in the next 3-7 business days. This timeframe also depends on your bank policy.

I apologize we could not fulfill your whole order.  Please let us know of any additional questions.

Warmly,"

customer:"Okay that makes sense.I do see that the charge is pending. I will wait for it to update. 
Thank you."

help me respond please but make it concise and simple
You're welcome! Please monitor your account and the pending charge should resolve soon. If you need further assistance afterwards, feel free to contact us. Thank you for your patience.

<new customer>

customer wanted to cancel pick up order :"Can I cancel this order? I can just go pick it up then because I need it by noon today."
our macro:"I am confirming that your order R334800883 has been canceled in our system. 

Please allow up to 7 business days for the pending authorization to clear from your card statement. This time frame depends on your bank's policy.

If you have additional questions, I would be happy to help!
"

please inform that the customer can now go to the store etc.

Absolutely! Here's the response with the necessary inclusion:

"I've confirmed that your order R334800883 has been successfully canceled in our system.

Since you need the items by noon today, you can now go to the store to pick them up in person. Just head to the store whenever it's convenient for you before your needed time.

Please remember that it may take up to 7 business days for the pending authorization of the canceled order to clear from your card statement, depending on your bank's policy.

Should you have any further inquiries or require assistance, don't hesitate to reach out. Happy shopping!"

<new customer context>
<please understand and remember every detail of the customer's concern>

customer:"Hello! I placed an online order for in store pick up. I received an email saying that my order had been cancelled, but the order number provided in that email did not match the order number I received in my confirmation email. I just wanted to get some clarification! The order number I received in the cancellation email was H48376325425. The email said payment has been voided, but it is still withdrawn from my bank account. Any help is appreciated, thank you!"

confirmed that the customer's pick up order is cancelled. however on her order there are 2 pick up shipments. the H48376325425 was cancelled due to inventory error.  however the items from H78855703524  which are for pick up at PIEDMONT MARKETPLACE are ready for pick up.

macro for cancelled pick up order:
"I am so sorry that your most recent pick-up order R332842678 was canceled!  This was due to an inventory error that our store team was not aware of until they attempted to fulfill your order.   

We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days.

I apologize we could not fulfill your order! "

macro for ready for pick up order
"I checked our system & your order is ready for pick up at the below Five Below location. Please be sure to bring a photo ID that matches the name that is on the order or show the store team this email thread:



[ENTER STORE ADDRESS HERE]



Your Pickup Number Is: [ENTER PICK UP NUMBER HERE]



Customers have 72 hours to pick up their orders before the order is automatically canceled and payment is voided.

"

Hello!

Thank you for reaching out about the confusion with your online order. Let's clarify the situation to ensure you're up to date.

The cancellation email you received for order number H48376325425 was indeed correct. This specific part of your order was canceled due to an inventory error, which means these items were not available at the time of processing.

Regarding the payment aspect, even though the cancellation email says the payment has been voided, it's common for banks to show a pending withdrawal until the transaction officially clears. This should rectify itself within 2-5 business days, but if it doesn't, please do let us know.

Now, onto the good news! The items corresponding to your second pick-up shipment order number H78855703524 are ready for collection at PIEDMONT MARKETPLACE. Here are the details for your pick-up:

[ENTER STORE ADDRESS HERE]

Your Pickup Number Is: [ENTER PICK UP NUMBER HERE]

Please collect your items within 72 hours to prevent automatic cancellation. When picking up your order, make sure to bring your photo ID or show this email conversation as confirmation.

Again, I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused by the canceled part of your order. If you have any more concerns or need further clarification, feel free to get in touch.

Thank you for your understanding, and we look forward to seeing you at the PIEDMONT MARKETPLACE for your pickup!

Best regards,
thanks however we need to apologize to the customer for the inconvenience and about informing to the customer about the cancellation

Hello!

I apologize for any confusion caused by the order cancellation. Upon reviewing your details, there was indeed a mix-up. Your order H48376325425 was canceled due to an inventory issue, which is why the email was sent to you.

Please rest assured, even though the charge still appears withdrawn from your bank account, it is in a pending state and will be reversed within the next 2-5 business days.

The great news is that the items from your other pick-up order, H78855703524, are ready for collection at PIEDMONT MARKETPLACE. Here are the details you'll need:

[ENTER STORE ADDRESS HERE]

Your Pickup Number Is: [ENTER PICK UP NUMBER HERE]

Please make sure to pick up your items within 72 hours, or the order will be subject to automatic cancellation. When you arrive, present a photo ID that matches the name on the order, or show this email thread for verification.

I'm truly sorry for any inconvenience this situation has caused you. We appreciate your understanding and are here to help if you have any further questions or concerns.

Thank you for choosing to shop with us, and we look forward to serving you at the pickup location.

Best regards,

<new customer context>

customer:"I have been waiting longer than the 6 hour time frame."
since customer placed a pick up order and pick up orders usually take 6 hours for it to be ready for pick up at stores.
however the order did not go through since the order exhibits strong fraudulent indicators.
macro for such scenario:"
Thank you for contacting us & I'm so sorry to hear this happened.   

Every order placed on the Five Below website is put through a security check.   I looked into your order #XXXXX and it appears that the security check returned a decline.

We aren't advised of the factors that contributed to the decline, as that would be a breach of your privacy. We have only been alerted as to the declining status.

If you would like to place another order with us, the following are a few suggestions to ensure that your next order is approved:

Log out of your account and log back in
Use a different device
Try another credit or debit card
Verify that all of the shipping and billing information provided is an exact match to the card being used


Your payment has been voided to the original form of payment. Please allow 2-7 business days for the void to reflect. This timeframe depends on your bank's policy.

Again, our apologies!  
"

please inform first to the customer that the order did not go through hence the lack of communciatioon regarding the cusotmer's order

Thank you for reaching out, and I apologize for the delay you've experienced beyond the expected 6-hour timeframe for order pickups.

Upon reviewing your order, I must inform you that unfortunately, it did not go through due to strong indicators of potential fraud identified during our security check process. We prioritize the security of our customers and, as a result, some orders are subject to additional scrutiny.

I understand that this might be frustrating, and I want to assure you that your payment has not been processed and will be voided. You should expect to see the void reflected in your bank account within 2-7 business days, depending on your bank's policies.

If you wish to try placing your order again, here are a few steps that might help ensure a successful transaction:

- Log out of your Five Below account and then log back in.
- Consider using a different device to place the order.
- Try with another credit or debit card.
- Double-check to make sure all shipping and billing information provided matches exactly with your credit card or bank details.

I apologize again for any inconvenience this has caused. If you have further questions or need assistance with placing a new order, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
thanks but don't change the macro please just add this :please inform first to the customer that the order did not go through hence the lack of communciatioon regarding the cusotmer’s order

Thank you for contacting us, and I apologize for the inconvenience you've encountered.

I need to inform you that your order did not go through, which is why there has been a lack of communication regarding the expected pickup time.

Every order placed on the Five Below website is subjected to a security check. I looked into your order and it appears that the security check resulted in a decline. 

We aren't informed of the specifics behind the decline, as that would infringe on your privacy. We have only been notified of the status.

To attempt placing another order, here are some tips that might help ensure it is approved:

- Log out of your account and log back in.
- Use a different device.
- Try another credit or debit card.
- Ensure that all shipping and billing information provided is an exact match to the card being used.

Your payment has been voided to the original form of payment. Please allow 2-7 business days for the void to reflect on your account. This time frame can vary based on your bank's policy.

We're sorry for this situation and appreciate your understanding. If there’s anything else we can do to assist you, please let us know.

"Thanks for writing in.  



We process all transactions as "credit" transactions. Refunds typically reflect within 2 to 5 business days, not including weekends and holidays.  Depending on your bank, it may take an additional 1-3 business days for the funds to reflect.



Please let me know if I can assist you with anything else!

instead of refunds state pending charges/payments

Certainly! Here is your revised message with the appropriate change:

---

Thanks for writing in.

We process all transactions as "credit" transactions. Pending charges or payments typically reflect as reversed or removed within 2 to 5 business days, not including weekends and holidays. Depending on your bank, it may take an additional 1-3 business days for the transaction to fully clear from your account.

Please let me know if there’s anything else I can help you with!

---

This revised message maintains the original structure while substituting 'refunds' with 'pending charges/payments' to accurately reflect the nature of the transaction being discussed.
first of we apologize for the inconvenience caused by the cancellation fo your order

I apologize for any inconvenience caused by the cancellation of your order.

We process all transactions as "credit" transactions. The reversal of any pending charges or payments from this order typically reflects within 2 to 5 business days, not including weekends and holidays. Depending on your bank, it may take an additional 1-3 business days for the funds to be visible in your account.

If you need further assistance or have any more questions, please let me know. I'm here to help.

Best regards,

[Your Name/Customer Service Team]

inform cusotmer this

Thank you for reaching out to us about your order R868288836 placed on 12/21.

I regret to inform you that, upon checking our system, your pick-up order has been canceled due to an inventory error at our store. Our team was not aware of this issue until they began processing your order, and for that, I sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this may have caused.

Please be assured that we have not charged your payment method for this canceled order. If you do see any pending charge on your account, it will be cleared within 2-5 business days.

I'm truly sorry we were unable to fulfill your order as expected. If there's anything else you need help with or if you have further questions, please let me know. We are here to assist you in any way we can.

Warm regards,

[Your Name/Customer Service Team]

Dear [Customer's Name],

customer:"Hello

I am wondering when you will put the Ravenclaw and Hufflepuff squishmallows on the website to order?
Or if you can tell me what store in Minnesota may have stock of those skus?
Please advise."

so i checked in on our system and can confirm both items are not available in any of our fulfillment centers. I proceeded to search for the items in all of the available stores in minnesota and upon checking the only available store in MN that has sufficient stock is the <store name with store location>  with 12 on hand with the ravenclaw and 18 on hand with the hufflepuff squishmallows. Please note that the availability here on our system is not 100% accurate and does not guarantee the availability of the item and pick up in store or BOPIS are currently off and will be back on the 26th of december, should you wish to purchase these items please do so in store. please email this response and somewhat enhance it but not too long

Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to us about the availability of Ravenclaw and Hufflepuff Squishmallows.

Upon checking our system, I'm afraid these items are not currently available in our online fulfillment centers for ordering. However, I have good news for you regarding in-store availability in Minnesota.

As of the latest update, <store name with store location> has a sufficient stock of these items, with 12 Ravenclaw and 18 Hufflepuff Squishmallows on hand. I must mention, though, that our system's stock numbers are not always 100% accurate, so they might not perfectly reflect current store inventory.

Please be aware that the in-store or Buy Online, Pick Up In Store (BOPIS) options will be unavailable until December 26th. If you'd like to purchase these Squishmallows, I recommend visiting the store in person.

I apologize that I couldn't facilitate an online order for you at this moment. If you have any further queries or require additional assistance, please feel free to reach out.

Thank you for your understanding, and happy shopping!

Best regards,

[Your Name/Customer Service Team]

"Confirmed stock on admin and then proceeded to search for availability and different stores on MN on admin. Informed customer about the possible on hand stock of  7925015-00 / 7925013-00 items at Five Below Tamarack Village. Informed customer that the availability is not guaranteed since the system stock is not 100%."
please enhance this grammar

After confirming the stock details in our administrative system, I conducted a thorough search to check the availability of items 7925015-00 / 7925013-00 at various stores across Minnesota. I am pleased to inform you that Five Below Tamarack Village may have these items in stock, with potential on-hand quantities available.

However, I must emphasize that while our administrative system provides us with stock numbers, these figures are not guaranteed to be 100% accurate. Therefore, the availability of these items at the store cannot be completely assured due to possible discrepancies or changes in stock levels that may occur between updates.

For the most current availability, I recommend contacting Five Below Tamarack Village directly or visiting the store. If you need further assistance or any additional information, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your understanding, and I hope you can find the Squishmallows you are looking for.

Best regards,

[Your Name/Customer Service Team]
not email format just grammar enhance/check

I informed the customer about the potential on-hand stock of these items at Five Below Tamarack Village. However, I also explained that the availability is not guaranteed since the stock levels reflected in our system are not 100% accurate.

customer:"On 12/21/23, I placed an order online for some items. Later in the day on 12/21/23, I received an email that part of my order was ready for pickup (3 items were out of stock). When I arrived at the store to pickup my order, my order could not be found. The employee at the store stated he would cancel my order.

I have two requests.

1. Please confirm that my order was canceled and that I will be receiving a refund.
2. Please have someone contact me or via phone or email for service recovery. I spent 40 minutes round trip driving to the store to pickup an order that I never received.

Thank you,
"

upon checking the order has been cancelled. 

our macro for pick up orders cancelled:"
Hello,

Thank you for contacting Five Below.

I am so sorry that your most recent pick-up order R667113734 was canceled!  This was due to an inventory error that our store team was not aware of until they attempted to fulfill your order.   

We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days.

I apologize we could not fulfill your order! 

Warmly,"

also tell customer that the cancellation was the probably the reason the store team could not find your order. apologize for the lack of communication with regards to this order.

Hello,

Thank you for reaching out, and I am sorry to hear about the difficulties you experienced with your recent order.

Upon reviewing your account, I can confirm that your order was indeed canceled. This cancellation occurred due to an inventory error, which likely led to the order not being found at the store when you arrived to pick it up. Your payment method has not been charged for the canceled items. Any related charges you see should be pending and are expected to clear within 2-5 business days.

I want to extend my sincerest apologies for the lack of communication that led to your inconvenience and for the time you lost making the trip to the store. We understand how precious your time is and regret that this situation did not meet the high standards we set for customer satisfaction.

To ensure proper service recovery and discuss this matter further, please provide us with the best phone number or email address to reach you. One of our dedicated team members will contact you promptly to assist in addressing your concerns.

Once again, I am truly sorry for this unfortunate experience, and we are committed to doing our best to make things right.

Warm regards,

We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days.

I apologize we could not fulfill your order! "

respond that the order is already cancelled.

Thank you for getting in touch regarding your order.

It turns out that your recent pick-up order R149046381 has already been canceled due to an inventory error. Our store team discovered the issue when they tried to fulfill your order, and as a result, they were unable to proceed.

Since the order has been canceled, rest assured that any payment made has not been processed. If you do notice any pending charges, these should be cleared from your account within 2-5 business days.

I apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused, especially since you no longer require the item. If there's anything else I can help you with, please let me know.

Best regards,

customer:"I would like to do a return but don't have my emails anymore.
would you be able to resend them? they were made under this email in oct"

our macro for online return policy:"Thanks for contacting us!

At Five Below, we will gladly exchange or return unopened or defective merchandise at any time after the purchase date with the original receipt. We are also happy to refund* you in the original form of payment with the original receipt or online order confirmation!

*If you do not have the order confirmation and would prefer a refund, we can have it resent to your email! Just let us know you need this :) 


Returns by Mail (Online Purchases Only)
If there is not a store close to you, you can ship your online return to the address below:

eCommerce Returns
12050 E. McGregor Rd
Indianapolis, IN  46259

Here's How it Works!

Reply to us here with your Order #, the items you wish to return, and the return reason (changed mind, defective, wrong item, etc). 
We will fill out a return form (RMA) on your behalf, and will be sent it back to you.
We ask that you print 2 copies: Place 1 copy in the package you're returning & keep the 2nd copy for your records.
We recommend using USPS, UPS, Fed Ex, or DHL as these carriers offer tracking information.
Reply back to our team with your tracking number and we will process the refund* once we receive your return! 
Five Below does not reimburse the cost of shipping for online returns or provide return shipment labels.

*Depending on your financial institution, it may take 2-10 business days for the credit to post to your account. Refunds will be credited to the original debit/credit card used for purchase.

If you have additional questions regarding your return, I would be happy to help!

Warmly, "

please insert there that here are some of the emails associated with your account with us at five below <emails>

Thank you for reaching out regarding your return.

I understand that you no longer have your emails from your purchase in October and need them to proceed with the return. I'm happy to help you with that. Here are some of the emails associated with your account with us at Five Below: <emails>.

Additionally, I can assist you with resending the order confirmation to your email. Just let me know you need this, and I’ll take care of it for you. :)

Regarding our return policy at Five Below, we gladly exchange or refund unopened or defective merchandise at any time after the purchase date with the original receipt or online order confirmation. If you want a refund and have your original receipt or order confirmation, we will refund you in the original form of payment.

To return items by mail (for online purchases only), if you do not have a store nearby, please follow the return process mentioned in our macro.

If you need the order confirmation or have any further questions regarding your return process, or if there's anything else I can do for you, please let me know. I'm here to help!

Warm regards,

"please follow the return process mentioned in our macro."
 don't say this i want to insert this: that here are some of the emails associated with your account with us at five below <emails>

to the whole macro do it without making too much changes with the macro

Thanks for contacting us!

At Five Below, we will gladly exchange or return unopened or defective merchandise at any time after the purchase date with the original receipt. We are also happy to refund* you in the original form of payment with the original receipt or online order confirmation!

Regarding your request, here are some of the emails associated with your account with us at Five Below: <emails>. If you would like the specific emails from your October purchases to be resent, I can absolutely take care of that for you. Just confirm and it will be done.

*If you do not have the order confirmation and prefer a refund, no problem! Once you let us know, we can resend it to your email. 

For returns by mail (applicable to online purchases only), and if there isn't a store conveniently located near you, you can send your online return to the following address:

eCommerce Returns
12050 E. McGregor Rd
Indianapolis, IN  46259

Here's how to proceed with your mail return:

1. Reply to us here with your Order #, the items you wish to return, and the reason for the return (changed mind, defective, wrong item, etc).
2. We'll complete a return form (RMA) on your behalf and send it back to you.
3. Please print 2 copies of the RMA: Place 1 inside the return package and keep the second one for your records.
4. For tracking and security, we recommend using a service such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, or DHL.
5. Once you have your tracking number, reply back to our team with it, and we will process your refund* as soon as we receive your return. 
Please note, Five Below does not cover the cost of shipping for online returns or provide return shipment labels.

*Depending on your financial institution, it may take 2-10 business days for the credit to post to your account once we process your return. Refunds will be credited to the original debit/credit card used for purchase.

If you have additional questions regarding your return or if there's anything else you need, I would be more than happy to help.

Warmly,
